prophecies.q: SpaceX 将在2024年前将人类送上火星
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2016年国际宇航大会（IAC）上宣布，SpaceX 计划在2024年前将人类送上火星，并在2030年前建立火星殖民地。
prophecies.q_en: SpaceX will send humans to Mars before 2024
prophecies.a_en: At the 2016 International Astronautical Congress (IAC), Musk announced that SpaceX planned to send humans to Mars before 2024 and establish a Mars colony by 2030.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2024年底，SpaceX 尚未将人类送上火星。星舰（Starship）仍处于轨道测试阶段，2024年完成了多次试飞但均未载人飞往火星。NASA 的载人火星任务目标也已推迟至2040年代。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of late 2024, SpaceX has not sent humans to Mars. Starship was still in orbital testing, completing several test flights in 2024 but none heading to Mars. NASA's crewed Mars mission target has also been pushed to the 2040s.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉将在2020年底实现全自动驾驶
prophecies.a: 马斯克多次在采访和推文中声称，特斯拉将在2020年底实现完全自动驾驶（Level 5），即车辆可以在任何路况下无需人类干预自主行驶。
prophecies.q_en: Tesla will achieve full self-driving by end of 2020
prophecies.a_en: Musk repeatedly stated in interviews and tweets that Tesla would achieve full self-driving (Level 5) by the end of 2020 — meaning vehicles could drive autonomously without human intervention in any conditions.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年3月，特斯拉仍未实现 Level 5 全自动驾驶。FSD（Full Self-Driving）Beta 版本虽已向用户推送，但仍需驾驶员随时准备接管，法律上仍属于 Level 2 辅助驾驶。马斯克自2014年起几乎每年都声称「明年实现」。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of March 2026, Tesla has not achieved Level 5 full self-driving. FSD (Full Self-Driving) Beta has been rolled out to users but still requires driver supervision and is legally classified as Level 2 assistance. Musk has claimed 'next year' nearly every year since 2014.

prophecies.q: 100万辆特斯拉自动驾驶出租车在2020年上路
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2019年特斯拉自动驾驶日（Autonomy Day）上宣布，到2020年将有超过100万辆特斯拉作为自动驾驶出租车（Robotaxi）运营。
prophecies.q_en: One million Tesla robotaxis on the road by 2020
prophecies.a_en: At Tesla's 2019 Autonomy Day, Musk announced that over one million Teslas would be operating as robotaxis by 2020.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年没有任何特斯拉自动驾驶出租车投入运营。截至2026年初，特斯拉 Robotaxi（Cybercab）仍在开发中，尚未商业化运营。Waymo 和百度萝卜快跑反而率先在多个城市实现了无人驾驶出租车商用。
prophecies.verdict_en: No Tesla robotaxis were in operation by 2020. As of early 2026, Tesla's Robotaxi (Cybercab) remains in development without commercial deployment. Waymo and Baidu Apollo Go have instead launched driverless taxi services in multiple cities first.

prophecies.q: Neuralink 将在2020年在人脑中植入芯片
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2019年表示，Neuralink 计划在2020年底前完成首次人体脑机接口植入手术。
prophecies.q_en: Neuralink will implant a chip in a human brain by 2020
prophecies.a_en: In 2019, Musk stated that Neuralink planned to complete its first human brain-computer interface implant by the end of 2020.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Neuralink 的首次人体植入推迟到2024年1月才完成。患者 Noland Arbaugh 成功接受了 N1 芯片植入，并能用意念控制电脑光标。比原计划晚了约4年。
prophecies.verdict_en: Neuralink's first human implant was delayed until January 2024. Patient Noland Arbaugh successfully received the N1 chip and could control a computer cursor with his thoughts. This was approximately 4 years behind the original schedule.

prophecies.q: SpaceX 星舰将在2022年实现火星无人着陆
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2020年表示，SpaceX 的星舰（Starship）将在2022年执行首次火星无人货运任务。
prophecies.q_en: SpaceX Starship will land on Mars unmanned by 2022
prophecies.a_en: In 2020, Musk stated that SpaceX's Starship would carry out its first unmanned cargo mission to Mars by 2022.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2022年星舰尚未完成首次轨道试飞（首次轨道测试在2023年4月进行）。截至2026年初，星舰仍在进行亚轨道和轨道测试，尚未执行任何火星任务。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2022, Starship had not yet completed its first orbital test flight (the first orbital test was in April 2023). As of early 2026, Starship is still conducting sub-orbital and orbital tests without any Mars missions.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉 Semi 电动卡车2019年量产
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2017年发布特斯拉 Semi 时承诺2019年开始量产交付。
prophecies.a_en: When Musk unveiled the Tesla Semi in 2017, he promised mass production and deliveries starting in 2019.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Tesla Semi 在2022年12月才开始首批交付（给百事可乐），比原计划晚了3年多。截至2026年初，Semi 仍为小批量生产状态，远未实现大规模量产。
prophecies.verdict_en: Tesla Semi began first deliveries in December 2022 (to PepsiCo), over 3 years behind schedule. As of early 2026, Semi remains in limited production, far from mass-scale manufacturing.

prophecies.a: 马斯克在2019年发布 Cybertruck 时宣布2021年底开始量产。
prophecies.a_en: When unveiling the Cybertruck in 2019, Musk announced mass production by the end of 2021.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Cybertruck 首批交付在2023年11月底才开始，比原计划晚了约2年。2024年产能逐步爬坡，但仍面临产能瓶颈和质量争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: Cybertruck first deliveries began in late November 2023, approximately 2 years behind schedule. Production ramped up through 2024 but still faced capacity constraints and quality controversies.

prophecies.q: AI 将在2025年前超越人类智能
prophecies.a: 马斯克在多次采访中表示，人工通用智能（AGI）最早可能在2025年出现，届时 AI 将在几乎所有认知任务上超越人类。
prophecies.q_en: AI will surpass human intelligence before 2025
prophecies.a_en: In multiple interviews, Musk stated that artificial general intelligence (AGI) could arrive as early as 2025, with AI surpassing humans in virtually all cognitive tasks.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2025年底，大语言模型（GPT-4、Claude、Grok 等）在特定任务上已超越大多数人类表现，但通用人工智能（AGI）尚未实现。AI 在创造性推理、物理世界理解等方面仍有明显局限。学界对 AGI 的定义和是否已达到仍有广泛争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of late 2025, large language models (GPT-4, Claude, Grok, etc.) surpassed most humans in specific tasks, but AGI has not been achieved. AI still has clear limitations in creative reasoning and physical world understanding. There is widespread debate about AGI's definition and whether it has been reached.

prophecies.q: 太阳能将成为全球最大能源
prophecies.a: 马斯克长期倡导太阳能，预测太阳能将在2030年前成为全球第一大能源来源，并称只需在内华达州铺设一小块太阳能板就能为全美供电。
prophecies.q_en: Solar will become the world's largest energy source
prophecies.a_en: Musk has long advocated for solar energy, predicting it will become the world's largest energy source by 2030 and claiming a small area of solar panels in Nevada could power all of the US.

prophecies.q: Starlink 将为全球提供高速互联网
prophecies.a: 马斯克预测 Starlink 卫星互联网将在2020年代中期实现全球覆盖，为偏远地区提供高速低延迟互联网。
prophecies.q_en: Starlink will provide global high-speed internet
prophecies.a_en: Musk predicted Starlink satellite internet would achieve global coverage by the mid-2020s, providing high-speed, low-latency internet to remote areas.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Starlink 截至2025年已在75个以上国家和地区提供服务，拥有超过400万用户，在轨卫星超过6000颗。虽然在部分国家因监管原因未能落地，但基本实现了全球覆盖的目标。这是马斯克少数按期兑现的预测之一。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2025, Starlink was available in over 75 countries and regions with more than 4 million subscribers and over 6,000 satellites in orbit. While regulatory barriers prevented service in some countries, it largely achieved global coverage. This is one of Musk's few predictions delivered roughly on schedule.

prophecies.q: SpaceX 猎鹰火箭将实现回收复用
prophecies.a: 马斯克在 SpaceX 创立初期就预测火箭将像飞机一样可回收复用，大幅降低太空发射成本。
prophecies.q_en: SpaceX Falcon rockets will be reusable
prophecies.a_en: From SpaceX's early days, Musk predicted rockets would be reusable like airplanes, dramatically reducing space launch costs.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2015年12月，猎鹰9号首次成功实现一级火箭陆地回收。此后 SpaceX 将火箭复用常态化，单枚助推器最多复用超过20次。发射成本从行业平均每公斤数万美元降至约2700美元/公斤，彻底改变了航天产业。
prophecies.verdict_en: In December 2015, Falcon 9 achieved its first successful first-stage land recovery. SpaceX subsequently normalized rocket reuse, with individual boosters reused over 20 times. Launch costs dropped from tens of thousands per kg to about $2,700/kg, fundamentally transforming the space industry.

prophecies.q: Hyperloop 超级高铁将革新交通
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2013年发布 Hyperloop Alpha 白皮书，设想真空管道列车以超过1000公里/小时的速度运行，旧金山到洛杉矶仅需30分钟。
prophecies.a_en: In 2013, Musk published the Hyperloop Alpha white paper, envisioning vacuum tube trains traveling over 1,000 km/h, with the San Francisco to Los Angeles trip taking just 30 minutes.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2026年初，没有任何商用 Hyperloop 线路建成。Virgin Hyperloop 在2020年完成了首次载人测试（时速仅172公里），但在2022年裁撤了整个客运部门。马斯克本人也未再积极推动此项目。概念验证虽有进展，但离商业化遥遥无期。
prophecies.verdict_en: As of early 2026, no commercial Hyperloop line has been built. Virgin Hyperloop completed its first passenger test in 2020 (at only 172 km/h) but shut down its entire passenger division in 2022. Musk himself stopped actively pursuing the project. While proof-of-concept made progress, commercialization remains far off.

prophecies.q: 人口下降是人类文明最大威胁之一
prophecies.a: 马斯克多次警告，全球生育率持续下降是人类面临的最大风险之一，如果趋势不逆转，许多国家将在本世纪内面临人口崩溃。
prophecies.q_en: Population decline is one of the biggest threats to civilization
prophecies.a_en: Musk has repeatedly warned that declining global birth rates are among the greatest risks facing humanity, and if the trend isn't reversed, many countries will face population collapse within this century.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 马斯克指出的趋势确实在加速。2024年韩国总和生育率跌至0.72，创全球纪录新低；中国2023年人口净减少208万；日本2024年新生儿数量再创新低。但「文明最大威胁」的判断在学界有争议，许多人口学家认为人口结构调整是可管理的。
prophecies.verdict_en: The trend Musk identified is indeed accelerating. South Korea's fertility rate fell to 0.72 in 2024, a global record low; China's population declined by 2.08 million in 2023; Japan's births hit another record low in 2024. However, the 'greatest threat to civilization' framing is debated — many demographers argue population adjustment is manageable.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉 Optimus 人形机器人将改变经济
prophecies.a: 马斯克在2022年 AI Day 上展示了 Optimus 原型机，预测人形机器人最终将比汽车业务更有价值，价格低于2万美元，能替代人类完成大部分体力劳动。
prophecies.q_en: Tesla Optimus humanoid robot will transform the economy
prophecies.a_en: At Tesla's 2022 AI Day, Musk unveiled the Optimus prototype and predicted humanoid robots would eventually be more valuable than the car business, priced under $20,000, and capable of replacing most human physical labor.

prophecies.q: 火星将在2030年前建立永久殖民地
prophecies.a: 马斯克反复表示，SpaceX 的终极目标是在2030年前在火星建立自给自足的人类殖民地，初期规模约100人。
prophecies.q_en: Mars will have a permanent colony before 2030
prophecies.a_en: Musk has repeatedly stated that SpaceX's ultimate goal is to establish a self-sustaining human colony on Mars before 2030, initially with about 100 people.

prophecies.q: 电动车将在2025年前占全球新车销量的大部分
prophecies.a: 马斯克在多个场合预测电动车将快速取代燃油车，到2025年电动车将占全球新车销量的主要份额。
prophecies.q_en: EVs will dominate global new car sales by 2025
prophecies.a_en: Musk predicted on multiple occasions that EVs would rapidly replace gas-powered cars, with EVs accounting for the majority of global new car sales by 2025.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2025年全球电动车（含插电混动）销量占比约25-30%，虽然增长迅速，但远未达到「大部分」（>50%）的水平。中国市场电动车渗透率领先全球，2025年新能源车渗透率超过50%，但欧美市场增长放缓。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2025, global EV (including PHEV) sales accounted for roughly 25-30% of new car sales. While growing rapidly, this was far from 'majority' (>50%). China led with NEV penetration exceeding 50% in 2025, but growth slowed in European and US markets.

prophecies.q: Neuralink 将让瘫痪者用意念控制设备
prophecies.a: 马斯克预测 Neuralink 脑机接口将首先帮助脊髓损伤患者恢复数字设备控制能力，并在2020年代中期实现商业化应用。
prophecies.q_en: Neuralink will let paralyzed patients control devices with their minds
prophecies.a_en: Musk predicted Neuralink's brain-computer interface would first help spinal cord injury patients regain control of digital devices, with commercial applications by the mid-2020s.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2024年1月 Neuralink 完成首例人体植入，患者 Noland Arbaugh 成功用意念控制电脑光标和玩游戏。但截至2026年初，Neuralink 仍处于临床试验阶段，仅有少数患者接受植入，距离商业化应用仍有较大距离。技术验证成功，但时间表和规模化目标未达成。
prophecies.verdict_en: In January 2024, Neuralink completed its first human implant. Patient Noland Arbaugh successfully controlled a computer cursor and played games using thought alone. However, as of early 2026, Neuralink remains in clinical trials with only a few patients implanted, still far from commercial availability. The technology was validated, but timeline and scale targets were not met.
